user_story: As an Employee, I want to select a financial year on the My Deductions screen, so that I can view deductions relevant to that tax period.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Deductions screen; When I choose a financial year; Then the deductions list is filtered to that period

user_story: As an Employee, I want to filter my deductions by category, so that I can focus on a specific type of deduction.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Deductions screen; When I select a category from the dropdown; Then only deductions in that category are shown

user_story: As an Employee, I want to search my deductions, so that I can quickly find matching deduction records.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have set filters on the My Deductions screen; When I click Search; Then the list refreshes with matching results

user_story: As an Employee, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my selections and start a new query.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the My Deductions screen; When I click Reset; Then all filters are cleared to their defaults

user_story: As an Employee, I want to view deduction details such as name, insurer/bank, policy/loan number, amount and payment dates, so that I can verify my declared deductions.
acceptance_criteria: Given deductions exist for the selected year; When the list loads; Then each row shows name of deduction, category, insurer/bank name, policy/loan number, amount, payment date and actual payment date

user_story: As an Employee, I want to refresh the deductions list, so that I always see the latest saved data.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the My Deductions screen; When I click refresh; Then the deductions list reloads with current data
